hero.title: Daily Word Challenge
hero.description: Learn one new word every day through a focused daily challenge.

differences.title: Grow vocabulary one word at a time
differences.description: Daily Word Challenge makes vocabulary learning approachable by keeping each day focused on one word.

items.title: One-word focus
items.description: Give the daily word enough attention to understand it.

items.title: Clear meaning
items.description: Review what the word means before trying to use it.

items.title: Daily practice
items.description: Make vocabulary learning part of a simple routine.

feel.title: A manageable daily learning habit
feel.description: The experience keeps vocabulary growth small, focused, and consistent.

items.title: Meet the word
items.description: Start the day with one new vocabulary item.

items.title: Understand it
items.description: Review the word and its meaning.

items.title: Put it to use
items.description: Look for a chance to use the word during the day.

audiences.title: Who uses Daily Word Challenge
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who wants a simple vocabulary-learning routine.

items.title: Students
items.description: Build vocabulary through a manageable daily practice.

items.title: Writers
items.description: Discover words that can expand written expression.

items.title: Curious learners
items.description: Add a small learning moment to every day.

resourceSection.title: Daily vocabulary essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep each challenge centered on understanding and using one word.

items.title: Daily word
items.description: Focus on one vocabulary item at a time.

items.title: Practical use
items.description: Apply the word to reinforce learning.

groupedSection.title: A simple daily challenge
groupedSection.description: Move from discovering the word to using it.

items.name: Discover
items.description: Reveal the word selected for the day.

items.name: Recall
items.description: Remember the word later in the day.

items.name: Practice
items.description: Use it in an appropriate context.

technicalSection.title: Built for focused daily learning
technicalSection.description: Daily Word Challenge follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready for today's word?
finalCta.description: Open Daily Word Challenge and learn one new word.
